card.text_raw_chs:

将你在本回合打出的下一张牌放置到你的[gold]抽牌堆[/gold]顶部。

card.text_raw_eng:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Put the next card you play this turn on top of your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
